newsHeadline: लेखा परिक्षक नियूक्ति गरेकाे जानकारी सम्बन्धमा [RFPL]
newsBody: लेखा परिक्षक नियूक्ति गरेकाे जानकारी सम्बन्धमा
Please find the attached file for more information.
Director Resignation and Appointment-NIFRA
Appointment of Chairman and Director

The 391st Board Meeting of the company, held on 2082.12.01 (March 15, 2026) has unanimously appointed Mr. Fanendra Raj Joshi as its new Chairman. Mr. Joshi, a nominee of Chilime Hydropower Co. Ltd., succeeds Mr. Tulasi Ram Dhakal, who resigned from the chairmanship due to personal commitments but will continue to serve as a Board Member. The transition is effective as of today's board resolution.

Dear Sir,

newsBody: During the company's 390th board meeting held on 2082/11/28 (Evening), Mr. Fanendra Raj Joshi (BOD Member from Chilime Jalavidyut Co. Ltd.) was inducted as a new Director. The board currently comprises 9 (nine) members representing Chilime, the NEA, and the general public.
